ABT (ERC-20) as the payment token. Deployed on Base Sepolia. Flow:   1. Poster calls createBounty() \u2014 ABT is transferred into escrow   2. Solvers submit off-chain; judge picks winner off-chain   3. Poster (or owner) calls awardBounty() \u2014 ABT released to winner   4. Poster can cancelBounty() before award \u2014 refund minus small fee   5. If deadline passes without award, solver can claimBounty() Fee model:   - Cancellation fee: 2% (sent to treasury)   - Award: 0% protocol fee (can be added later)","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. awardBounty(uint256,address).details: Only callable by the poster or contract owner

cancelBounty(uint256).details: Only callable by the poster before award/expiry

claimExpired(uint256).details: Anyone can call this after the deadline to trigger refund

params._abtToken: Address of the ABT ERC-20 token

params.amount: ABT amount to escrow (must have prior approval)
params.deadlineTimestamp: Unix timestamp after which bounty expires

returns.bountyId: The ID of the newly created bounty

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

abtToken().notice: The ABT ERC-20 token used for payments

awardBounty(uint256,address).notice: Award bounty to the winning solver

cancelBounty(uint256).notice: Cancel a bounty and refund the poster (minus cancellation fee)

claimExpired(uint256).notice: Claim an expired bounty (refund to poster after deadline)

createBounty(uint256,uint256,string).notice: Create a new bounty with ABT escrow

isBountyActive(uint256).notice: Check if a bounty is still active and not expired

rescueTokens(address,uint256).notice: Emergency: recover tokens accidentally sent to this contract

totalEscrowed().notice: Total ABT currently held in escrow
